model_training.description: Configuration for training the PARModel generator

metrics_generation.description: Configuration for generating synthetic metrics data

column_descriptions._time: Timestamp in Unix milliseconds. Sequence index for time-series ordering.
column_descriptions.id: Cgroup path identifier (e.g., '/kubepods.slice', '/init.scope'). Identifies container/pod/service entity for grouping sequences.
column_descriptions.counter: Cumulative metric value for CPU, network, and block I/O metrics.
column_descriptions.gauge: Current metric value for memory metrics (e.g., container_memory_working_set_bytes).
column_descriptions.cpu: Alternative CPU metric value column (if populated).
column_descriptions.device: Block device identifier for blkio metrics (e.g., '/dev/dm-0').
column_descriptions.major: Linux device major number. Used with 'minor' to identify block devices.
column_descriptions.minor: Linux device minor number. Used with 'major' to identify block devices.
column_descriptions.operation: I/O operation type: 'Read' or 'Write' (for blkio metrics).
column_descriptions.interface: Network interface name (e.g., 'datapath', 'ens192') for network metrics.
column_descriptions.scope: Systemd scope identifier. May be empty for some metrics.
column_descriptions.state: State information. May be empty for some metrics.

load_metrics.description: CPU, memory, and disk I/O metrics for load monitoring. Maps to DAM load_metrics input.

traffic_metrics.description: Network traffic metrics. Maps to DAM traffic_metrics input.

log_generation.description: Configuration for generating logs from metrics

log.description: Log template metrics. Maps to DAM log_metrics input.

label_generation.description: Configuration for generating anomaly labels for testing
